## What

A one-sentence description of the change.

## Why

The constraint, incident, or design pressure that motivated this change. What invariant it preserves or establishes.

## Tests

Which test layers cover this change (invariants, state transitions, behavioral scenarios, stress/edge). If this is a bug fix, include the transcript or test that would have caught the bug.

## Clean-room attestation

- [ ] I have not referenced or copied code from the official Interactive Brokers client libraries during this change.
- [ ] I have not referenced or copied code from other OSS IB libraries (`hadrianl/ibapi`, `scmhub/ibapi`, `scmhub/ibsync`, `portfoliome/ib`, or others) during this change.
- [ ] Any reference to official protocol behavior is drawn from official documentation or wire traces I captured myself.

See `docs/provenance.md` for the full clean-room policy.
